name: Buttermilk Pancakes, (Use Egg Beaters)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Egg Beaters or real eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add buttermilk to the beaten eggs.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the egg mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in the melted butter.
6. Heat a lightly greased griddle or frying pan over medium-high heat.
7. Pour spoonfuls of batter onto the hot griddle.
8. Cook until both sides are golden brown and the pancakes are set (approximately 2-3 minutes per side).
Note: To make buttermilk, add 1 tablespoon of lemon juice to 1 cup of milk and let it sit for a few minutes before using.
